templates.github:
## {roadmapTitle} Learning Journey

### About

### Timeline

- **Resources:** {resources}+ free resources

### Roadmap

- [ ] Phase 1: Foundation
- [ ] Phase 2: Core Concepts
- [ ] Phase 3-7: Advanced Topics

### Progress
